member.name: M:GTA.World.CreateParticleEffect(GTA.ParticleEffectAsset,System.String,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.InvertAxisFlags)
member.summary:
Creates a
at a position that runs looped.
member.param: The world coordinates where the effect is.
What rotation to apply to the effect.
How much to scale the size of the effect by.
Which axis to flip the effect in.
